case_title: CCSF, TAX COLLECTORS OFFICE, INVESTIGATION DIV VS TABIOS, ORLINO DBA WESTERN CONST. CO.

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 490127 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF, TAX COLLECTORS OFFICE, INVESTIGATION DIV AS TO DEFENDANT TABIOS, ORLINO DBA WESTERN CONST. CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF, TAX COLLECTORS OFFICE, INVESTIGATION DIV RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TABIOS, ORLINO DBA WESTERN CONST. ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TABIOS, ORLINO DBA WESTERN CONST. CO.
